name: Add a Product Category
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Anatomy of a Product Category"}], "data-id": "anatomy-of-a-product-category"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Categories are used to organise your products into easy to navigate verticals for your customers. It is important to plan your product category tree in advance of adding any products. When designing your category tree, remember to take into account future growth plans and the addition of new product lines."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here are some example categories:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://skeletaltheme.neto.com.au/category-one/", "children": [{"text": "Skeletal Theme"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://countrytheme.neto.com.au/bikes/", "children": [{"text": "Country Theme"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://storefronttheme.neto.com.au/clothing/", "children": [{"text": "Store Front Theme"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://atomictheme.neto.com.au/category-one/", "children": [{"text": "Atomic Theme"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto supports any number of categories and subcategories, you can also add product categories as and when required. You can also add or update categories in bulk with a CSV spreadsheet upload via the Data Import Tool."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Products can be assigned to multiple categories for maximum exposure."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To help your customers find what they are looking for, you will need to create a category tree that is easy to navigate. We recommend not exceeding three levels in your category tree."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000ERdZAMA1.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000ERdZAMA1.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Add a Product Category2.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example: "}, {"text": "Clothing", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Men's Clothing", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shirts", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The above is an example of a category tree that is 3 levels deep. If users cannot find what they are looking for within 3 clicks, your conversion rates will be negatively impacted."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Category SEO"}], "data-id": "category-seo"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Category pages will also contribute to your websites overall SEO. Each Category Page will automatically be indexed on to Google and other search engines, so this should contain keywords relevant to the category."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Product Category"}], "data-id": "add-product-category"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product categories help you organise products on your webstore and assist customer navigating your site. They're also used to link up to markplace categories on eBay and Amazon."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Add an Individual Category"}], "data-id": "add-an-individual-category"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create a product category:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Product Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New Category", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "children": [{"text": "If the new Product Category is to be used as a parent category (e.g. 'T-Shirts') then leave the "}, {"text": "Parent Content", "bold": true}, {"text": " dropdown blank."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Product Category Via Import"}], "data-id": "add-product-category-via-import"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The product categories you want to add should be entered into a comma separated values (CSV) file to ensure it can be read by Neto. The CSV file must also be in the correct format, so that data can be imported to the correct fields. A complete list of fields and their usage "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1442-content-and-category-import-and-export-fields", "children": [{"text": "are available here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "To import products and categories at once, refer to the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/668-product-import-wizard", "children": [{"text": "Product Import Wizard"}]}, {"text": " article."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Required Category Fields"}], "data-id": "required-category-fields"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Each method has a set of "}, {"text": "Required Fields", "bold": true}, {"text": " that must be completed before a Category can be created:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Content Type", "bold": true}, {"text": " - This will always be: "Product Category"."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Parent Content Path", "bold": true}, {"text": " - The structure of your category."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " - The name of the Category/Sub Category."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Primary Description", "bold": true}, {"text": " - Optional to add here the category description, which will display to customers on your site when they click on the category. "}, {"text": "This field accepts HTML", "italic": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Secondary Description", "bold": true}, {"text": " - Again, optional secondary description field, which will display to customers on your site below the primary description, when they click on the category. "}, {"text": "This field accepts HTML", "italic": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sort Order", "bold": true}, {"text": " - Used to set the order of your categories when customers view them. Descending - Highest First."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For your convenience, we have created a default Category Templates which you can download "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.neto.com.au/assets/downloads/templates/category_import_example.csv", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To import product categories (or other content) into Neto:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Download "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.neto.com.au/assets/downloads/templates/contents_import_popular.csv", "children": [{"text": "Neto's sample .CSV template"}]}, {"text": " or create your own CSV file populated with product categories."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Content Type", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " fields are mandatory fields."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Information within the "}, {"text": "Content Type", "bold": true}, {"text": " field must match one of the available content types within the "}, {"text": "Content Types Manager", "bold": true}, {"text": " page ("}, {"text": "Settings & Tools > All Settings & Tools > Control Panel > Content Types Manager", "bold": true}, {"text": ")."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Populate all relevant fields within the Neto. CSV template. The following conditions must be adhered to:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save the completed file as a Comma Separated Value (CSV, MS-DOS) file."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools > Import Data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Data Type", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, click the "}, {"text": "Product Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": " radio button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Import Type", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, click the "}, {"text": "Perform complex import", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and select "}, {"text": "Start Data Import Wizard", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "

The sort order field is therefore often referred to as the "priority" field. For example, "}, {"text": "99", "bold": true}, {"text": " will appear above "}, {"text": "89", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This gives you the flexibility to add a new category at a later date and have it appear at the top of your list without having to reorder your entire list."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Sort Via Bulk Import"}], "data-id": "sort-via-bulk-import"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can change the sort order for product categories and other content in bulk via csv import by using the following columns:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Content type (eg. Product Category, Blog, etc)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Content ID (found in the content list)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sort Order (the higher the value entered, the higher up in the list an item will appear.)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Import Data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Product Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": ". If unsure, leave them as the defaults."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000ESRPKMA5.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000ESRPKMA5.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "12.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000ESRSiMAP.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000ESRSiMAP.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2024-09-06 at 3.24.40 pm.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Choose if you want to save the import settings as a template (and give it a "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": ") then click "}, {"text": "Process File Now", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The file will be queued to import, and update the priority of your content."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Delete a Category"}], "data-id": "delete-a-category"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product categories can be only be deleted if they have no child categories. Child categories must be deleted first, or re-assigned to a different parent category. To delete a category:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Product categories", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the product category(s) to delete using the checkboxes."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "At the bottom of the page, click the "}, {"text": "With x Selected", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Delete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your product category will be deleted."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
